[偷笑][偷笑][偷笑]，这个月染看起来像个坏人，难道她看到男主有轩辕的影子所以想要利用男主。坏的嘞！[思考][思考][思考]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772435876,"group_id":"7610146338579172377","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4TzBwajsf/6fm4i5TiruyQ=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"68874621036","user_name":"镇里饭店的林奉紫"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"68874621036","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7610146338579172377","book_info":{"abstract":"社畜猝死穿成大荒废柴，绑定上古文明修复系统征召蓝星摸鱼党当免费劳工！玩家肝机甲、修基地、杀异兽，我躺着当
